files.00_Overview.md: Add missing Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways sections. Consolidate redundant weak/strong coupling explanations into single table. Merge solver information (chtMultiRegionFoam) into proper solver reference section.
files.01_Coupled_Physics_Fundamentals.md: Severe redundancy with 00_Overview.md - both files explain weak/strong coupling with identical Thai language. Consolidate coupling types into Overview; expand this file with deeper mathematical formulation and coupling algorithm implementation details. Add Learning Objectives.
files.02_Conjugate_Heat_Transfer.md: Good core content but lacks Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways. Add mathematical derivation of interface conditions. Expand troubleshooting section for common CHT convergence issues. Link to Fundamentals for coupling theory.
files.03_Fluid_Structure_Interaction.md: Comprehensive but over-long. Restructure into clear 3W sections: What (FSI definition), Why (applications), How (implementation). Extract heavy mathematical content into dedicated equations subsection. Add Learning Objectives at top. Consolidate Thai explanations with English content for consistency.
files.04_Object_Registry_Architecture.md: Missing Learning Objectives. Expand with practical debugging examples. Add common pitfalls section (lookup failures, null pointers). Include memory management considerations.
files.05_Advanced_Coupling_Topics.md: Add Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways. Section 1 (FSI) duplicates content from file 03 - either remove or reference. Add performance optimization strategies. Expand relaxation techniques comparison table.
files.06_Validation_and_Benchmarks.md: Missing Learning Objectives. Add acceptance criteria section. Expand with validation workflow diagram. Include common validation pitfalls. Link benchmark cases to OpenFOAM tutorial paths.
files.07_Exercises.md: Transform from code snippets to structured exercises with clear objectives, step-by-step instructions, expected outputs, and validation checks. Add difficulty progression indicators. Include solution hints in collapsible sections.

global_strategy: This folder shows severe content duplication between files (00 and 01 both explain weak/strong coupling; 03 and 05 both cover FSI). Restructure with clear separation: Overview = catalog/map; Fundamentals = theory; 02-04 = specific implementations; 05 = advanced techniques ONLY; 06 = validation; 07 = hands-on exercises. Apply 3W Framework consistently: What (definitions), Why (motivation/applications), How (implementation with examples). Add Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways to ALL files. Standardize Thai/English language balance across files.
